channel.title: WV on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in WV on Detention Pipeline

item.title: Braxton County, WV — USDA Distress Profile (3 indicators)
item.description:
USDA Economic Research Service county typology flags Braxton County, WV with 3 distress indicators:

losing population; low employment ratio; low post-secondary education

Full flags: Low Employment, Low PostSecondary Ed, Population Loss

This county already has an IGSA detention facility. The combination of existing federal detention relationship + economic distress = high vulnerability to expansion pitch.

Nonmetro: nonmetro

Source: USDA ERS County Typology Codes, 2025 edition

item.title: Central Regional Jail — Braxton, WV
item.description:
IGSA detention facility: Central Regional Jail in Braxton County, WV.

Source: Vera Institute ICE Detention Trends (vera-institute/ice-detention-trends)

item.title: Doddridge County, WV — USDA Distress Profile (3 indicators)
item.description:
USDA Economic Research Service county typology flags Doddridge County, WV with 3 distress indicators:

energy-transition county (mining-dependent); low employment ratio; low post-secondary education

Full flags: Mining, Low Employment, Low PostSecondary Ed

This county already has an IGSA detention facility. The combination of existing federal detention relationship + economic distress = high vulnerability to expansion pitch.

Nonmetro: nonmetro

Source: USDA ERS County Typology Codes, 2025 edition

item.title: GREENBRIER GOVERNMENT SOLUTIONS INC — ICE WYOMING, WV $10,093,407
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: GREENBRIER GOVERNMENT SOLUTIONS INC Award ID: 70CTD024FR0000071 Amount: $10,093,407.23 Description: CISCO SMARTNET HARDWARE MAINTENANCE AND LICENSES Period: 2024-09-30 to 2026-09-29 Location: WYOMING, WV (FIPS: 54109)

item.title: Logan County, WV — USDA Distress Profile (5 indicators)
item.description:
USDA Economic Research Service county typology flags Logan County, WV with 5 distress indicators:

energy-transition county (mining-dependent); losing population; persistent poverty (20%+ poverty rate for 30+ years); low employment ratio; low post-secondary education

Full flags: Mining, Low Employment, Low PostSecondary Ed, Population Loss, Persistent Poverty

This county already has an IGSA detention facility. The combination of existing federal detention relationship + economic distress = high vulnerability to expansion pitch.

Nonmetro: nonmetro

item.title: North Central Regional Jail — Doddridge, WV
item.description:
IGSA detention facility: North Central Regional Jail in Doddridge County, WV.

Source: Vera Institute ICE Detention Trends (vera-institute/ice-detention-trends)

item.title: WV Regional Jail & Corr. — Kanawha, WV
item.description:
